The '''Alderaanian Council''' served as the government of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]] and the survivors of the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]]. It consisted of between one hundred and two thousand members, both professional politicians and members of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] merchant class. It was presumably the leadership body of the [[Alderaan Alliance]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]], its [[President/Legends|president]] was [[Threkin Horm]].
